scope: Full VP1-VP8 executed against dura.baseplane.ai production after cutover

infra_fixes_applied_during_run.reason: Default KillMode=control-group swept the whole service cgroup on systemctl restart, killing detached session-runner children and defeating the decoupling. Default RuntimeDirectory lifetime wiped /run/duraclaw/sessions on stop, erasing pid/meta/exit files.
Enable POST /debug/reap for VP6 on-demand reaper trigger. Not source-controlled — local env change only.

infra_fixes_applied_during_run.action: pnpm install + build shared-transport + build session-runner
infra_fixes_applied_during_run.reason: Infra deploy pipeline syncs files but does not run pnpm install/build, so first deploy after a new workspace package landed with no dist/ and no node_modules symlinks. Gateway returned `session-runner bin not found` until this was done manually.

steps.note: 14/14 buffered-channel tests via bun test (branch-local run)
Live UI session 42e1c689 PID 2066482 survived 3 systemctl restarts on prod (after the KillMode fix).
GET /sessions/:id/status on prod gateway returned state:"running" with intact sdk_session_id after each restart.

POST /debug/reap: first reap sigtermed=[vp6-stale], sleep process terminated; second reap markedCrashed=[vp6-stale], .exit written with state:"crashed". scanned=2 (live session + stale) — live session correctly NOT marked stale.

CF Worker redeploy 9875c174 at 16:37:36 UTC triggered by commit 0731c2b (push 16:37:18, deploy landed ~18s). Session 42e1c689 PID 2066482 remained alive (14:28 etime at check). Session log shows 11 DialBackClient drop/reconnect cycles with spec backoff [1s→3s→9s→27s→30s×]. Zero buffer overflows. Zero gap sentinels emitted. SDK kept streaming (last_event_seq 42 → 60).
Identical to VP4: session-runner PID unchanged across systemctl restart. Also caught the KillMode=control-group bug on the first attempt — fix committed in 47f2969.

summary: All 8 VP steps pass on prod after two infra fixes (systemd KillMode + first-deploy install/build). The KillMode=control-group bug was real and caught only at prod — our dev-container VP8 run missed it because the test gateway was spawned outside systemd's cgroup.
followups: Deploy pipeline should run `pnpm install` + `pnpm build` on the synced tree before restarting the gateway, so new workspace packages don't leave the gateway returning `session-runner bin not found`.
Deploy pipeline should also re-install the systemd unit file from packages/agent-gateway/systemd/ into /etc/systemd/system/ and run daemon-reload when the unit file changes.

Investigate frequent DialBackClient drops on prod (11 in 14 min) — likely DO hibernation or CF edge idle timeout. Not a VP failure (BufferedChannel + reconnect handle it cleanly) but worth understanding.
